---
title: "Handout 4: Data Is Friend"
format: html
---
  
## Understanding your data context

Who is the data about 

<Insert Calendar> -- unstructured data??  Page of a survey (how data was collected) -> converted to the rectangle!

Here is a spreadsheet -- <insert calendar format>
  + what is a row -- week of the year? A single day?
  + how many columns?

## Reading in the data & following file paths

1. 
2.
3.
  
## Exploring the data structure 

+ What does the rectangle look like?
  + what is a row -- week of the year? A single day?
  + how many columns?
  + the same data can look like different rectangles (8 can be 1x8 or a 2x4 or a 4x2) shape-shifting data.

Here is a spreadsheet -- <long format>
